competitors.name: GoHighLevel
competitors.note: All-in-one marketing/CRM but not investor-specific LMS

competitors.name: Teachable + Kajabi
competitors.note: Generic course hosting, no investor tooling

market_research.unique_value: Vertically integrated qualification-to-coaching pipeline specifically for RE investor lead school operators. Combines auth, org management, qualification funnels, event-driven automation, and a/b testing in one monorepo. Not a generic LMS.
market_research.recommendation: Continue — fills niche gap between generic LMS platforms and RE-specific data tools. No direct competitor does qualification→automation→coaching in one stack.
